_comment: Release manifest (spec Appendix B) for the voxterm-data-sink PRODUCTION deployment. A pinned client (spec §6.3, voxterm-sink-upload --measurement-policy pinned) checks the live quote's MRTD/RTMR0..2 against a dstack_base_images entry and the RTMR3 compose-hash against compose_hash. Values below were read back from the live prod quote (app_id 737d7cb9c5fbdff22d88408b3fdf3463a1d088b8) and the report_data binding to the sink_sig key was verified. Re-pin on any image/compose change.
